query:
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) AS addedDate,
  COUNT(*) AS totalProjects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%RSS Feed%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromRSS,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%Projectory%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromProjectory,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%Tenders WA%' OR sources LIKE '%tenders.wa%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromTendersWA,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%ICN%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromICN,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%AusTender%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromAusTender,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%ASX%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromASX,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'hot' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hotCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'warm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warmCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'cold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS coldCount
FROM projects
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND suppressed = 0
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY addedDate ASC;
command:

  DATE(createdAt) AS addedDate,
  COUNT(*) AS totalProjects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%RSS Feed%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromRSS,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%Projectory%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromProjectory,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%Tenders WA%' OR sources LIKE '%tenders.wa%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromTendersWA,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%ICN%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromICN,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%AusTender%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromAusTender,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sources LIKE '%ASX%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fromASX,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'hot' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hotCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'warm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warmCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'cold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS coldCount
FROM projects
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND suppressed = 0
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY addedDate ASC;
